message:
feat(extras): add text effects module and enhance visual fx sampling

New text_effects.rs module providing:
- Typewriter animation effect
- Text reveal/conceal transitions
- Glow and shadow text effects
- Animated gradient text

Sampling improvements:
- Add additional sampling patterns
- Improve interpolation quality
- Export sampling module from visual_fx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
